item.title: Contact
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Don't hesitate to reach out with the contact information below, or send a message using the form.

Get in Touch

(913) 205-5493
info@ranclo.llc
RANCLO, LLC
Olathe, KS 66061
USA

Send Us a Message

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to RANCLO.LLC, a healthy living company and proprietor of the Caffe' Menta coffee cup.

Eric has been the original thought creator and problem solver of multiple different novel inventions in development at various stages. In addition to his inventions and other various investments, he is also the proprietor of the Overland Park Racquet Club. More information can be found here.

Brandon has spent the last 20 years working for a top Aerospace company in roles throughout the entire product development and management lifecycle, ranging from engineering, product dev., supply chain, and most recently running a $700M+ manufacturing facility. In addition to his career in product development and the integrated supply chain, Brandon is a patent holder and serial co-founder with startups ranging from real estate arbitrage to the medical device field to agricultural irrigation.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: About Us webpage for ranclo.llc. Ranclo is the proprietor of the Caffe' Menta breath mint coffee cup where you get a mint with every coffee order.

[contact-field required="1" type="name" label="Name"/]
[contact-field label="Email" required="1" type="email"/]
[contact-field required="1" type="textarea" label="Message"/]

item.title: Caffe' Menta products
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
We are proud to offer the Caffe' Menta. The convenience of getting a breath mint with your coffee cup provides surprising confidence. You know that you have fresh breath when you need it! We offer several placement options of the Caffe' Menta; from the popular thermal sleeve to the removable bottom. Each with its own unique benefit to the retailer, but that consumers will sure to love. The breath mint storage, affectionately called Caffe' Menta, enhances ticket sales for coffee retailers. It provides a value-driven approach. It maintains margins while providing consumers a fun and unique experience. They can enjoy this after finishing their beverage.

Thermal Sleeve

The thermal sleeve Caffe' Menta option upgrades the boring, brown thermal sleeve. It offers a convenient solution for the consumer with the breath mint built directly in the thermal sleeve. It intended for use with singled-walled paper cups. Upgrading the sleeve will give consumers an option that they will have a strong willingness to pay for.

Details

Cup Bottom

The cup bottom Caffe' Menta option is designed for insulated cups that don't require a thermal sleeve. It provides a breath mint storage location on the underside of the cup. Intended for double wall and insulated disposable coffee cups, the removable secondary bottom contains the breath mint. The cup bottom flexibility provides an easy and novel storage solution without interfering with stacking of the cups.

Details

Peel & Stick

The peel and stick option is the most versatile and works well with any type of beverage - hot or cold! Simply just peel off the the back layer exposing the adhesive and attach to the consumers beverage of choice!

Details

Intellectual Property

We believe that our products are a differentiator for coffee retailer / manufacturer that invests in using it. Adding the Caffe’ Menta will unlock additional earnings by adding a complementary , high-margin add-on option that consumers will be sure to love and appreciate.

That is why we are strongly committed to investing heavily in our intellectual property , thereby protecting the value the product creates and the brands that choose to provide it to their customers. United States provisional patent application # 63/156,182 was filed in Q1 2021 looking to secure broad claim language protecting the invention of a system and method for storage and delivery of an item simultaneously with the delivery of a beverage.

Some embodiments of the invention comprise a method to incorporate an item, such as a breath freshener into a beverage container, such as a disposable or non-disposable coffee cup.

While some embodiments of the invention comprise a method to incorporate an item, such as a breath freshener into a beverage container, such as a disposable or non-disposable coffee cup, it is not limited to just that.

Embodiments of the present invention are disclosed herein; however, it is to be understood that the disclosed embodiments are merely exemplary of the principles of the invention, which may be embodied in various forms. 

Value Proposition

The Caffe' Menta is a retail coffee menu offering that customers will embrace, enabling instant increased ticket pricing & top-line revenue growth. Additionally, the high margin add-on will enable increased operating income.

Learn More

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: <iframe title="VideoPress Video Player" aria-label='VideoPress Video Player' width='782' height='440' src='https://videopress.com/embed/elPZ2a4O?cover=1&autoPlay=1&loop=1&muted=1&persistVolume=0&playsinline=1&preloadContent=auto&useAverageColor=1&hd=1' frameborder='0' allowfullscreen data-resize-to-parent="true"></iframe><script src='https://v0.wordpress.com/js/next/videopress-iframe.js?m=1633526814'></script>

item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Caffe' Menta Products
Value Proposition

RANCLO, LLC has invented a method to incorporate a breath mint with your daily cup of coffee. We affectionately refer to this as the Caffe' Menta (Italian for Coffee Mint). We have multiple embodiments available. These are sure to please both consumers and businesses alike. Let's start with a story.

Coffee is a huge part of our lives. Most of us love it and start our day with it every day. It gives us the start to the day like a sprinter exploding out of the starting blocks. Unfortunately one of the biggest downfalls of our favorite beverage is the well known "coffee breath". You know it when you smell it, and it is very unpleasant to say the least.

Now imagine yourself sitting around a conference table at work, or perhaps with friends at your favorite bistro and you get a whiff of the dreaded coffee breath. After you compose yourself , you discretely check your own breath to make sure that it isn't you. You reach for your gum or mint and realize you forgot in the fury of activities trying to get out the door. Panic. Insecurity. Immediate loss of Confidence.

It is here, in situations like this that the Caffe Menta was created for. We have combined two of the greatest gifts that mother nature has given us, mint + coffee.

EXPERIENCE THE CONVENIENCE, ENJOY THE CONFIDENCE

We are proud to offer the Caffe' Menta where the convenience of getting a breath mint with your coffee cup provides you with surprising confidence knowing that you have fresh breath when you need it! We offer several placement options of the Caffe' Menta; from the popular thermal sleeve to the removable bottom. Each with its own unique benefit to the retailer, and the eventual consumers will be sure to love.

Caffe' Menta Products
Value Proposition
item.excerpt:encoded: Welcome to RANCLO, LLC , home of the Caffee Menta Coffee Mint Cup and other healthy living products.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Welcome to RANCLO.LLC, home of the patent pending Caffee Menta Coffee Mint Cup and other healthy living products. The owners of the patent pending caffee menta breath freshener that is part of the green, recyclable, travel coffee cup. Contact us to learn all about our different options!

Contact Us for all items related to the Caffe' Menta Coffee Mint + Cup.

a:17:{s:2:"to";s:19:"brandon.c@cykyl.com";s:7:"subject";s:17:"[www.ranclo.llc] ";s:12:"show_subject";s:2:"no";s:6:"widget";i:0;s:14:"block_template";N;s:19:"block_template_part";N;s:2:"id";i:221;s:18:"submit_button_text";s:6:"Submit";s:14:"customThankyou";s:0:"";s:21:"customThankyouHeading";s:26:"Your message has been sent";s:21:"customThankyouMessage";s:30:"Thank you for your submission!";s:22:"customThankyouRedirect";s:0:"";s:10:"jetpackCRM";b:1;s:9:"className";N;s:9:"postToUrl";N;s:14:"salesforceData";N;s:12:"hiddenFields";N;}

item.title: Cup Bottom
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
The Cup bottom Caffe' Menta option is designed for insulated cups that don't require a thermal sleeve. It provides a breath mint storage location on the underside of the cup. Intended for double wall and insulated disposable coffee cups, the removable secondary bottom contains the breath mint. The cup bottom flexibility provides an easy and novel storage solution without interfering with stacking of the cups.

Benefits

  • Aligns with existing consumer behavior, enabling accelerated adoption rates.
  • Removable bottom location is ideal for cup stacking.
  • Mint location provides insulation barrier to prevent melting or softening of breath mint.
  • Low product cost
  • Accretive to top-line growth driven by average ticket increases.
  • High margin upsell that will add to bottom-line operating income

The cup bottom can be manufactured in such a way that the breath mint housing compartment can be located on the underside of the cup bottom, or mounted to the removable, secondary bottom. Attaching the mint to the secondary bottom provides an insulation barrier to protect the mint from mounting and gives the consumer easy access to enjoy their breath mint.

If you are interested in licensing the thermal sleeve or any other application or have further questions, please contact us.

Products
Contact Us

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: [contact-field label="Name" type="name" required="true" /] [contact-field label="Email" type="email" required="true" /] [contact-field label="Website" type="url" /] [contact-field label="Message" type="textarea" /]

a:17:{s:2:"to";s:19:"brandon.c@cykyl.com";s:7:"subject";s:27:"[www.ranclo.llc] Cup Bottom";s:12:"show_subject";s:2:"no";s:6:"widget";i:0;s:14:"block_template";N;s:19:"block_template_part";N;s:2:"id";i:270;s:18:"submit_button_text";s:6:"Submit";s:14:"customThankyou";s:0:"";s:21:"customThankyouHeading";s:26:"Your message has been sent";s:21:"customThankyouMessage";s:30:"Thank you for your submission!";s:22:"customThankyouRedirect";s:0:"";s:10:"jetpackCRM";b:1;s:9:"className";N;s:9:"postToUrl";N;s:14:"salesforceData";N;s:12:"hiddenFields";N;}

item.title: Peel and Stick
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
The peel and stick option offers a solution that is the most versatile and works well with any type of beverage – hot or cold! Simply just peel off the the back layer exposing the adhesive and attach to the consumers beverage of choice!

Benefits

  • Convenient and easy to apply
  • Independent from any cup or lid type
  • Aligns with existing consumer behavior, enabling accelerated adoption rates.
  • Option with the most flexibility – peel and stick to any semi-flat surface
  • Accretive to top-line growth
  • High margin upsell that will add to bottom-line margin growth

This option of the Caffe' Menta features a removable backing that is used to provide a method of attaching the breath freshener to any style of the cup that is used. Once applied, the consumer then has the ability to peel off the front for the enjoyment of the breath freshener! This option of the Caffe' Menta is designed to be compatible will all cup types, both hot and cold. Simply just peel and attach to provide the consumer with an enjoyable upgrade they are sure to enoy!

If you are interested in licensing the peel and stick, or any other application or have further questions, please contact us.

Products
Contact Us

item.title: Patent Status
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded: United States provisional patent # 63,156,182 application has been filed in Q1 2021.  The US Utility patent application is looking to secure broad claim language protecting the invention of a system and method for storage and delivery of an item simultaneously with the delivery of a beverage.

item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Price List

A Study in

Each print is signed by the artist, and is limited to an edition of 300.

a:17:{s:2:"to";s:19:"brandon.c@cykyl.com";s:7:"subject";s:17:"[www.ranclo.llc] ";s:12:"show_subject";s:2:"no";s:6:"widget";i:0;s:14:"block_template";N;s:19:"block_template_part";N;s:2:"id";i:502;s:18:"submit_button_text";s:6:"Submit";s:14:"customThankyou";s:0:"";s:21:"customThankyouHeading";s:26:"Your message has been sent";s:21:"customThankyouMessage";s:30:"Thank you for your submission!";s:22:"customThankyouRedirect";s:0:"";s:10:"jetpackCRM";b:1;s:9:"className";N;s:9:"postToUrl";N;s:14:"salesforceData";N;s:12:"hiddenFields";N;}

item.title: Value Proposition
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
1. People appreciate convenience and will pay for it
  2. Easy to Use
  3. Add-on high-margin revenue of 3-5%
  4. mint sub-category could be expanded to seasonal flavor varieties to complement seasonal beverages
  5. Minimal tooling and capital costs for supply chain

Menu board

The average cup of black coffee in the US ranges from $2.35 for a small to $2.88 for a large cup of coffee. Comparing the Caffe' Menta breath freshener suggested price of 30 cents to the other common coffee add-on options, you can see that it is less than or comparable to the other options in terms of both individual price points but also as a percentage of the original coffee price. It is our conviction that consumers will willingly and enthusiastically opt for the breath mint for a minimal upcharge in exchange for the confidence of having that extra mint available.

Offering the Caffe Menta as an optional add-on to your to-go coffee will get you an instant three to five percent increase on the national average ticket. THAT'S TOPLINE GROWTH at a fraction of the cost. AND your customers will love the convenience it offers!

Modeling the typical consumer adoption rates of the Caffe Menta on a (conservative) annual scale demonstrates the significant increase in revenue over time as customers adopt and repeat.

*Assumes 3% annual compound growth rate (CAGR) of the offering of the Caffe' Menta v. 1% YoY without.

Incremental Revenue per Store projected over STRAP. Modeled with Rogers production adoption curve over 5 years conservatively and 3 years standard consumer product adoption.

Caffe' Menta Products
Contact Us

item.title: product preview
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Thermal Sleeve

The thermal sleeve option offers a convenient solution for the consumer with the breath freshener built-in.

Details

item.title: line
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Value Proposition

the Caffe Menta is a menu offering that customers will embrace enabling instant increased ticket pricing & top-line revenue growth while improving op margin.

Learn More

item.title: line
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded: <!-- wp:separator {"className":"is-style-wide"} --> <hr class="wp-block-separator is-style-wide"/> <!-- /wp:separator -->

item.title: Protein Creamer
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Features

•Convenient and easy to apply

•Independent from cup and lid

•Gives consumers and coffee retailers the flexibility to add a breath freshener upgrade

This option of the Caffee Menta features a removable backing that is used to provide a method of attaching the breath freshener to any style of the cup that is used. Once applied, the consumer then has the ability to peel off the front for the enjoyment of the breath freshener!

Benefits

•Doesn’t require a change in consumer behavior

•Option with the most flexibility – peel and stick to any semi-flat cup surface

• Accretive to top-line growth

•High margin upsell that will add to bottom-line margin growth

If you are interested in licensing the thermal sleeve or any other application or have further questions, please contact us.

Products
Contact Us

item.title: Protein Creamer
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded: Coming Soon

item.title: Thermal Sleeve
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
The thermal sleeve Caffe' Menta option upgrades the boring, brown thermal sleeve. It offers a convenient solution for the consumer with the breath mint built directly in the thermal sleeve. It intended for use with singled-walled paper cups. Upgrading the sleeve will give consumers an option that they will have a strong willingness to pay for.

Benefits

  • Aligns with existing consumer behavior, enabling accelerated adoption rates.
  • Mint location provides insulation barrier to prevent melting or softening of breath mint.
  • Low product cost
  • Accretive to top-line growth driven by average ticket increases.
  • High margin upsell that will add to bottom-line operating income

The thermal sleeve will be manufactured in such a way that the breath mint storage compartment will be embedded into the sleeve material and accessible to the consumer.  The breath mint compartment will be a permanent part of the thermal sleeve and will be part of the existing sleeve manufacturing process.  The mint storage compartment would have a removable, exterior, safety film that when opened, gives access to the breather mint. 

If you are interested in licensing the thermal sleeve or any other application or have further questions, please contact us.

Products
Contact Us

item.title: Card Vault
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981

item.title: Gold Bullets
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
• Benefits
  • Aligns with existing consumer behavior, enabling accelerated adoption rates.
  • Removable bottom location is ideal for cup stacking.
  • Mint location provides insulation barrier to prevent melting or softening of breath mint.
  • Low product cost
  • Accretive to top-line growth driven by average ticket increases.
  • High margin upsell that will add to bottom-line operating income

item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Caffe' Menta Products
Value Proposition

RANCLO, LLC has invented a method to incorporate a breath mint with your daily cup of coffee. We affectionately refer to this as the Caffe' Menta (Italian for Coffee Mint). We have multiple embodiments available that are sure to please both consumers and businesses alike, so let's start with a story.

Coffee is a huge part of our lives. Most of us love it and start our day with it every day. It gives us the start to the day like a sprinter exploding out of the starting blocks. Unfortunately one of the biggest downfalls of our favorite beverage is the well known "coffee breath". You know it when you smell it, and it is very unpleasant to say the least.

Now imagine yourself sitting around a conference table at work, or perhaps with friends at your favorite bistro and you get a whiff of the dreaded coffee breath. After you compose yourself, you discretely check your own breath to make sure that it isn't you. You reach for your gum or mint and realize you forgot in the fury of activities trying to get out the door. Panic. Insecurity. Immediate loss of Confidence.

It is here, in situations like this that the Caffe Menta was created for. We have combined two of the greatest gifts that mother nature has given us, mint + coffee.

EXPERIENCE THE CONVENIENCE, ENJOY THE CONFIDENCE

We are proud to offer the Caffe' Menta where the convenience of getting a breath mint with your coffee cup provides you with surprising confidence knowing that you have fresh breath when you need it! We offer several placement options of the Caffe' Menta; from the popular thermal sleeve to the removable bottom. Each with its own unique benefit to the retailer, and the eventual consumers will be sure to love.

Caffe' Menta Products
Value Proposition
item.excerpt:encoded: Welcome to RANCLO, LLC , home of the Caffee Menta Coffee Mint Cup and other healthy living products.

item.dc:creator: daytrader1981

item.dc:creator: daytrader1981

item.title: Header
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981

item.title: Footer
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981

item.title: Custom Styles
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded: {"version": 2, "isGlobalStylesUserThemeJSON": true }

item.title: Mint - healthy living to the core
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded: RANCLO, LLC at its core is a healthy living company. We aim to reflect that in everything we do from our products, our processes, as well as our own personal lives. This not only includes offering products that are beneficial to life, but are supportive in sustaining this beautiful planet that we inhabit. That is why we are committed to designing our products with 100% post consumable recycled paper and recyclable plastics.

item.title: Wall Logo
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded: Welcome to RANCLO.LLC, a healthy living company and proprietor of the Caffe' Menta coffee cup.

item.title: Intellectual Property 2-17
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

We believe that our products are a differentiator for the coffee retailer and manufacturer that invests in using it. Adding the Caffe' Menta will unlock additional earnings by adding a complementary, high-margin add-on option that consumers will be sure to love and appreciate.

We are strongly committed to investing heavily in our intellectual property, thereby protecting the value the product creates and the brands that choose to provide it to their customers. United States provisional patent application # 63/156,182 was filed in Q1 2021 to secure broad claim language, protecting the invention of a system and method for storage and delivery of an item simultaneously with the delivery of a beverage.

While some embodiments of the invention comprise a method to incorporate an item, such as a breath freshener into a beverage container, such as a disposable or non-disposable coffee cup, it is not limited to just that.

Embodiments of the present invention are disclosed herein; however, it is to be understood that the disclosed embodiments are merely exemplary of the principles of the invention, which may be embodied in various forms.

item.title: gold buttons
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded:
Caffe' Menta Products
Value Proposition

item.title: Custom Styles
item.dc:creator: daytrader1981
item.content:encoded: {"version": 3, "isGlobalStylesUserThemeJSON": true }
